alwaysExpandRoles.description: Always expands the role list in profile popouts (Vencord-only)

alwaysTrust.description: Removes the annoying untrusted domain and suspicious file popup (Vencord-only)

domain.description: Remove the untrusted domain popup when opening links (restart required)

file.description: Remove the 'Potentially Dangerous Download' popup when opening links (restart required)

anonymiseByDefault.description: Whether to anonymise file names by default

method.description:
Anonymising method

Values: 0 = Random Characters, 1 = Consistent, 2 = Timestamp

AutoDNDWhilePlaying.description: Automatically updates your online status (online, idle, dnd) when launching games (Vencord-only)

statusToSet.description: Status to set while playing a game

betterFolders.description: Shows server folders on dedicated sidebar and adds folder related improvements (Vencord-only)

sidebar.description: Display servers from folder on dedicated sidebar (restart required)

closeAllFolders.description: Close all folders when selecting a server not in a folder

closeAllHomeButton.description: Close all folders when clicking on the home button (restart required)

closeOthers.description: Close other folders when opening a folder

forceOpen.description: Force a folder to open when switching to a server of that folder

keepIcons.description: Keep showing guild icons in the primary guild bar folder when it's open in the BetterFolders sidebar (restart required)

showFolderIcon.description:
Show the folder icon above the folder guilds in the BetterFolders sidebar (restart required)

Values: 0 = Never, 1 = Always, 2 = When more than one folder is expanded

betterGifPicker.description: Makes the gif picker open the favourite category by default (Vencord-only)

BlurNSFW.description: Blur attachments in NSFW channels until hovered (Vencord-only)

format.description: The timer format. This can be any valid moment.js format

notifyOnAutoConnect.description: Whether to notify when Dev Companion has automatically connected.

experiments.description: Enable Access to Experiments & other dev-only features in Discord! (Vencord-only)

toolbarDevMenu.description: Change the Help (?) toolbar button (top right in chat) to Discord's developer menu (restart required)

favoriteEmojiFirst.description: Puts your favorite emoji first in the emoji autocomplete. (Vencord-only)

messageClickActions.description: Hold Backspace and click to delete, double click to edit/reply (Vencord-only)

enableDeleteOnClick.description: Enable delete on click while holding backspace

requireModifier.description: Only do double click actions when shift/ctrl is held

messageLogger.description: Temporarily logs deleted and edited messages. (Vencord-only)

collapseDeleted.description: Whether to collapse deleted messages, similar to blocked messages (restart required)

inlineEdits.description: Whether to display edit history as part of message content

ignoreBots.description: Whether to ignore messages by bots

ignoreSelf.description: Whether to ignore messages by yourself

ignoreUsers.description: Comma-separated list of user IDs to ignore

ignoreChannels.description: Comma-separated list of channel IDs to ignore

ignoreGuilds.description: Comma-separated list of guild IDs to ignore

moreQuickReactions.description: Increases the number of reactions available in the Quick React hover menu (Vencord-only)

newGuildSettings.description: Automatically mute new servers and change various other settings upon joining (Vencord-only)

messages.description:
Server Notification Settings

Values: 0 = All messages, 1 = Only @mentions, 2 = Nothing, 3 = Server default

noBlockedMessages.description: Hides all blocked/ignored messages from chat completely (Vencord-only)

ignoreMessages.description: Completely ignores incoming messages from blocked and ignored (if enabled) users (restart required)

OnePingPerDM.description: If unread messages are sent by a user in DMs multiple times, you'll only receive one audio ping. Read the messages to reset the limit (Vencord-only)

channelToAffect.description: Select the type of DM for the plugin to affect

allowEveryone.description: Receive audio pings for @everyone and @here in group DMs

platformIndicators.description: Adds platform indicators (Desktop, Mobile, Web...) to users (Vencord-only)

colorMobileIndicator.description: Whether to make the mobile indicator match the color of the user status. (restart required)

ReviewDB.description: Review other users (Adds a new settings to profiles) (Vencord-only)

notifyReviews.description: Notify about new reviews on startup

showWarning.description: Display warning to be respectful at the top of the reviews list

serverInfo.description: Allows you to view info about a server (Vencord-only)

showHiddenChannels.description: Show channels that you do not have access to view. (Vencord-only)

showMode.description:
The mode used to display hidden channels. (restart required)

Values: 0 = Plain style with Lock Icon instead, 1 = Muted style with hidden eye icon on the right

defaultAllowedUsersAndRolesDropdownState.description: Whether the allowed users and roles dropdown on hidden channels should be open by default

showMeYourName.description: Display usernames next to nicks, or no nicks at all (Vencord-only)

mode.description: How to display usernames and nicks

friendNicknames.description: How to prioritise friend nicknames over server nicknames

displayNames.description: Use display names in place of usernames

inReplies.description: Also apply functionality to reply previews

showIcon.description: Show an icon for toggling the plugin (restart required)

contextMenu.description: Add option to toggle the functionality in the chat input context menu

sortFriendRequests.description: Sorts friend requests by date of receipt (Vencord-only)

showDates.description: Show dates on friend requests (restart required)

spotifyControls.description: Adds a Spotify player above the account panel (Vencord-only)

useSpotifyUris.description: Open Spotify URIs instead of Spotify URLs. Will only work if you have Spotify installed and might not work on all platforms

previousButtonRestartsTrack.description: Restart currently playing track when pressing the previous button if playtime is >3s

textReplace.description: Replace text in your messages. You can find pre-made rules in the #textreplace-rules channel in Vencord's Server (Vencord-only)

typingIndicator.description: Adds an indicator if someone is typing on a channel. (Vencord-only)

includeCurrentChannel.description: Whether to show the typing indicator for the currently selected channel

includeMutedChannels.description: Whether to show the typing indicator for muted channels.

includeBlockedUsers.description: Whether to show the typing indicator for blocked users.

indicatorMode.description:
How should the indicator be displayed?

Values: 3 = Avatars and animated dots, 1 = Animated dots, 2 = Avatars

typingTweaks.description: Show avatars and role colours in the typing indicator (Vencord-only)

showAvatars.description: Show avatars in the typing indicator

showRoleColors.description: Show role colors in the typing indicator

alternativeFormatting.description: Show a more useful message when several users are typing

vencordToolbox.description: Adds a button to the titlebar that houses Vencord quick actions (Vencord-only)

showPluginMenu.description: Show the plugins menu in the toolbox

whoReacted.description: Renders the avatars of users who reacted to a message (Vencord-only)
